title: The Battle for Syrup Village Escalates
description: On pages 16–19, the battle for Syrup Village intensifies as the Straw Hats, Usopp, and the village’s defenders confront Kuro’s pirates.
scene: The quiet village becomes a battlefield, with Usopp’s lies turning into real courage and the Straw Hats forcing Kuro’s plan to unravel.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Even our last glimmer of hope

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Oh no! He chose such a bad time to appear!!

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: It has been pretty long since dawn

dialogue.speaker: Kuro
dialogue.text: I was won- dering why the plan wasn't carried out...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: D) the name "Too Miko" appeared in "One piece", "Busu Zone", and "Ruden" 'Rupounn'reeshin'. Who is he? There was no indication in any manga, can you please tell me?;) I'll make it simple! Who

summary: This part pushes the arc from conspiracy into open battle, testing Usopp’s courage and the Straw Hats’ trust in him.
